nasb.text: Yes, thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, concerning the vessels that are left in the house of the Lord and in the house of the king of Judah and in Jerusalem,

esv.text: thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, concerning the vessels that are left in the house of the Lord, in the house of the king of Judah, and in Jerusalem:

cnv.text: 論到那些留在耶和華殿中和猶大王宮中，以及在耶路撒冷中的器皿，萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：

ccb.text: 论到这些剩下来的物件，以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说，
